unit_test.title: Unit 3 My weekend plan 单元基础过关测验

questions.question: 'tomorrow' 的意思是'昨天'。
questions.explanation: tomorrow 的意思是明天，yesterday 才是昨天。

questions.question: 'take a trip' 的意思是'去探险'。
questions.explanation: take a trip 的意思是去旅行。

questions.question: 句子 'I am going to see a film' 中 be going to 表示打算做某事。
questions.explanation: be going to + 动词原形表示未来的计划或打算。

questions.question: 'Where' 常用于询问地点。
questions.explanation: Where 是对地点的提问。

questions.question: 'post office' 是'邮局'的意思。
questions.explanation: post office 是固定词组，指邮局。

questions.question: Which word means '漫画书'?
questions.explanation: comic book意为漫画书。

questions.question: What ______ you going to do this evening?
questions.explanation: 主语是you，be动词应用are。

questions.question: Sarah is going to ______ her grandparents tonight.
questions.explanation: be going to 后面跟动词原形。

questions.question: I'm going to buy a dictionary in the ______.
questions.explanation: 买字典通常要去书店(bookstore)。

questions.question: — ______ are you going? — This afternoon.
questions.explanation: 答句是时间点，问句应使用 When。

questions.question: We are going to ______ a film tonight.
questions.explanation: see a film 是固定搭配，表示看电影。

questions.question: I'm going to take a trip ______ week.
questions.explanation: be going to搭配将来时间next week。

questions.question: I want to send a ______ to my friend.
questions.explanation: 寄送明信片(postcard)是常见表达。

questions.question: Have a good time! — ______.
questions.explanation: 当别人祝你玩得愉快时，应回答谢谢。

questions.question: — ______ are you going to the cinema? — By bus.
questions.explanation: 答句是方式(by bus)，应用How提问。

questions.question: I am going to the park ____ (明天).
questions.explanation: 明天的英文单词是 tomorrow。

questions.question: My father ____ going to wash his car.
questions.explanation: 主语 My father 是第三人称单数，be动词选is。

questions.question: Let's go and ____ a film.
questions.explanation: 看电影搭配动词see。

questions.question: Where are you ____ to go?
questions.explanation: be going to 结构中缺少going。

questions.question: 将下列短语与中文意思连线。
questions.explanation: A对应3，B对应2，C对应4，D对应1。

questions.question: 将时间状语与对应意思连线。
questions.explanation: tonight是今晚，this morning是今天上午，next week是下周，this afternoon是今天下午。

questions.question: 将其连成一句话：are, Where, going, you, ?
questions.explanation: Where引导的be going to特殊疑问句，结构为Where+be+主语+going?

questions.question: 将其连成一句话：am, to, I, study, going, .
questions.explanation: 陈述句主语在前：I + am + going + to + 动词原形。

exam.title: 人教版六年级英语上册 Units 3 核心素质评价卷

questions.question: 'dictionary' 的中文意思是词典。
questions.explanation: dictionary解为字典、词典。

questions.question: 动词 visit 后面不能直接接地点或人。
questions.explanation: visit可以直接接宾语，如visit my aunt, visit Beijing。

questions.question: 我们通常晚上(evening)去看电影(see a film)。
questions.explanation: 语境逻辑成立。

questions.question: 句子 'We are going to buy a comic books' 语法正确。
questions.explanation: a 是修饰单数，books是复数，不能连用。

questions.question: 表示计划打算做某事，只能用 will，不能用 be going to。
questions.explanation: 在小学阶段，be going to 是表示计划最核心的结构。

questions.question: I'm going to ______ computer lessons next week.
questions.explanation: be going to 后面必须使用动词原形。

questions.question: What's the meaning of 'half price'?
questions.explanation: half 是二分之一，price是价格。

questions.question: Can I help you? — ______.
questions.explanation: 商店或服务性用语的礼貌回答。

questions.question: Why ______ you going to the library?
questions.explanation: 根据 going 判断前面的 be 动词应搭配 you，故用 are。

questions.question: If you want to read books, you should go to the ______.
questions.explanation: 读书要往图书馆。

questions.question: ______ is your father going to the park? — At 9 o'clock.
questions.explanation: 提问具体的时间点（几点钟）应用 What time。

questions.question: I want to ______ my teacher.
questions.explanation: 探望某人常用visit。

questions.question: We are going to meet ______ 2 p.m.
questions.explanation: 具体时间点前用介词 at。

questions.question: I have ______ today. I'm going to relax at home.
questions.explanation: 根据在家休息推断是没有计划。

questions.question: My sister and I ______ going to the cinema.
questions.explanation: 主语是二人，复数，用 are。

questions.question: What is he ____ to do next week?
questions.explanation: 句子缺 going 构成将来计划结构。

questions.question: ____ are you going? To the supermarket.
questions.explanation: 对地点提问用 where。

questions.question: I'm going to the bookstore to buy a ____ (字典).
questions.explanation: 词典/字典是 dictionary。

questions.question: I ____ going to be a teacher one day.
questions.explanation: I 对应 be 动词 am。

questions.question: 将词汇与中文意思连线。
questions.explanation: word book-单词书, postcard-明信片, trip-旅行, dictionary-词典。

questions.question: 将活动与相关物品连线。
questions.explanation: draw画图，write写故事，read读诗，learn学功夫。

questions.question: 将其连成一句话：going, Who, with, you, are, ?
questions.explanation: Who are you going with? 意为你要和谁一起去？

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 表示即将发生的动作或未来的计划打算。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: 主语 + am/is/are + going to + 动词原形 (V-base)
common_mistakes: going to 后面接了动词 ing 形式
be 动词与主语不匹配（如 I is ...）
knowledge_summary.tips: 标志词有 tomorrow, next week, tonight, this afternoon。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 针对计划的不同侧面进行提问。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: 特殊疑问词 + be + 主语 + going to + 动词原形?
common_mistakes: 特殊疑问句语序搞错（把 be 放在了主语后）
knowledge_summary.tips: What 问内容，Where 问地点，When/What time 问时间。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 周末计划中常见生活场景词组。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: 动词 + 名词 (如 see a film, take a trip, visit grandparents)
common_mistakes: see a film 写成 look a film
take a trip 中间掉了冠词 a
knowledge_summary.tips: 记词组比记单个动词更有效，注意动词后面的名词搭配。
